portfolio.banner.title: RYAN NGUYEN
portfolio.aboutme.name: KUVUGA KURI NJYE
portfolio.aboutme.details: Mfite uburambe bw'imyaka 5 nk'umutunganya porogaramu wuzuye (Full Stack Developer), mfite ubumenyi bukomeye buhuza impande zombi z'iterambere rya webu. Mfite uburambe bwo gukoresha MongoDB, NodeJS, ReactJS, NextJS, ASP.NET, SQL Server, HTML5, SCSS
portfolio.workexp.phase1.name: UMUSHAKASHATSI W'IMBERE
portfolio.workexp.phase1.details.1: Nzi neza MERN stack nabonye binyuze mu mishinga y'ishuri.
portfolio.workexp.phase1.details.2: Nateje imbere porogaramu nshya za Web3 nkoresheje Solidity nk'umutunganya porogaramu wuzuye (NodeJS, ReactJS) mu mishinga y'imperuka.
portfolio.workexp.phase2.name: UMUTUNGANYA POROGARAMU WA FRONTEND (AMAHUGURWA)
portfolio.workexp.phase2.details.1: Kwandika kode ya frontend kuri Trava.Finance
portfolio.workexp.phase2.details.2: Gukora kuri frontend y'imishinga myinshi ya Web3 nkoresheje NextJS.
portfolio.workexp.phase3.name: UMUSHAKASHATSI W'INYUMA
portfolio.workexp.phase3.details.1: Nayoboye iterambere ry'inyuma hakoreshejwe ASP.NET framework ku mushinga ukomeye kandi munini, nkemeza imikorere ikomeye n'ubushobozi bwo kwaguka.
portfolio.workexp.phase3.details.2: Nashyizeho kandi nshyira mu bikorwa imbugabutumwa za SQL Server kugira ngo nongerere ubushobozi imicungire y'amakuru n'ubudakemwa.
portfolio.workexp.phase3.details.3: Gukoresha Microsoft 365 API kugira ngo nkuremo amakuru, mfite uburambe bwo gukora n'ibibazo by'amakuru menshi
portfolio.education.name: UBUREZI
portfolio.education.phase1.title: IMPAMYABUMENYI
portfolio.education.phase1.details.1: Narangije neza impamyabumenyi mu Buhanga bw'Ikoranabuhanga.
